params.name: enterpriseAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the enterprise account (starts with 'ent').

params.name: startTime
params.description: The start of the time range to filter events, in ISO 8601 format. Events on or after this time will be included.

params.name: endTime
params.description: The end of the time range to filter events, in ISO 8601 format. Events before this time will be included.

params.name: originatingUserId
params.description: Filter events to those performed by a specific user.

params.name: modelId
params.description: Filter events by the ID of the affected model (base, table, etc.).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The number of events per page. Default is 100.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to fetch the next or previous page.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: The order in which to return events. Default is desc.

params.name: previous
params.description: Pagination cursor for the previous page of results.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of audit log events for the specified enterprise account. Events can be filtered by user ID, event type, model ID, category, and time range. By default, returns up to 180 days of events in reverse chronological order.

info.name: Airtable List Audit Log Export Requests

params.name: enterpriseAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the enterprise account (starts with 'ent').

items.docs: Returns a list of all audit log export requests that have been created for the enterprise account. Each request includes its status and download URLs when complete.

info.name: Airtable Create an Audit Log Export Request

params.name: enterpriseAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the enterprise account (starts with 'ent').

items.docs: Creates a new audit log export request for the enterprise account. The request specifies a time range and optional filters. Once processing is complete, the audit log data can be downloaded from the provided URLs.

info.name: Airtable Get an Audit Log Export Request

params.name: enterpriseAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier of the enterprise account (starts with 'ent').

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique identifier of the audit log export request.

items.docs: Retrieves the status and details of a specific audit log export request. When the request is complete, the response includes download URLs for the exported data.
